name: Oliver Finch
learned: Oliver Finch is a local historian who has dedicated his life to studying the town's folklore. He possesses a wealth of knowledge about the town’s past and is known for his engaging storytelling. He often collaborates with Margaret on historical research.
currently: Oliver is currently helping Margaret unravel the mysteries surrounding the treasure letters. He spends his time in the Historical Society's research room, sifting through old records and artifacts to find connections to the treasure's possible location.
lifestyle: Oliver maintains a flexible schedule, often working late into the night at the Historical Society. He enjoys casual conversations over coffee with Margaret and frequently goes on hikes to explore local historical sites. His evenings are often spent writing or lecturing about the town's history.
